_comment_2: Hand-written to give fraiseql-server a non-empty schema so it boots cleanly under the multi-tenancy overlay. The docs-test only exercises /health, /graphql `{ __typename }`, and admin REST — no real data reads required.
_source: src/content/docs/building/multi-tenancy.md — Project type as the row-mode worked example.
_baseline_example: scripts/docs-test/fixtures/postgres/_smoke.compiled.json — used as the shape reference (Cycle 5 smoke).
_note_on_tenancy_section: We do NOT populate `security.tenancy` here. The docs-test verifies the off-the-shelf binary's behaviour at the frozen SHA — namely that multi-tenant mode is not wired regardless of TOML (#330). Populating `security.tenancy.mode = "row"` here would not flip the binary into multi-tenant mode; that requires AppState builders the binary doesn't call.
